{"summary":"...","tests":"...","memory_decision":"used|ignored|rejected|unavailable","evidence":{"session_id":"","message_id":""}}

I’ll inspect the parser and targeted tests first, then query prior session memory only if the intended edge case is not obvious from current code/tests.
